brief: Previous session started adding updated_at timestamp to bookmarks but was interrupted. Resume: set on create (=created_at), update on PUT, include in all responses.
acceptance_criteria: New bookmarks have updated_at equal to created_at
PUT updates updated_at to current time
GET, list, export all include updated_at
Import sets updated_at to creation time
oracle_test: Create bookmark, verify updated_at===created_at. PUT it, verify updated_at > created_at. Export, verify updated_at on all.
